notes: Source metadata is never model input.
Current cloud records have known collection context but no per-sample historical Attack Manifest, so they are schema_qc_only.
The Week 6 attack release CSV is evidence-only because it intentionally omits raw 177-field payloads and joinable session IDs.
The Week 7 experiment annotation registry is a label-only sidecar. It is joined after raw-payload QC and never copied into normalized model inputs.

sources.notes: 393 redacted rows: 178 complete attack-capable/abnormal, 184 partial attack-capable/abnormal, 31 complete benign isolation controls. Not joinable to raw payloads.

Week 7 rows include collection_manifest, field-status-v1 and a verified label-only registry. Complete CDP triplets form a fingerprint-field-effect pilot task; complete mitmproxy triplets remain a separate transport-path task. Incomplete attempts are failure-analysis only.
